metadata.title: Pixel Banner
metadata.description: Apply an image from various sources as a banner to your notes.

regex.source: Notice("Please enter an API key first")
Notice(isValid ? "\u2705 Pexels API key is valid!" : "\u274C Invalid Pexels API key")
regex.target: Notice(isValid ? "\u2705 Pexels API密钥有效！" : "\u274C Pexels API密钥无效")

regex.source: Notice(isValid ? "\u2705 Pixabay API key is valid!" : "\u274C Invalid Pixabay API key")
regex.target: Notice(isValid ? "\u2705 Pixabay API密钥有效！" : "\u274C Pixabay API密钥无效")
Notice("字段名称必须是唯一的！")

regex.source: Notice("Pixabay API key is not set. Please set it in the plugin settings.")
regex.target: Notice("Pixabay API密钥未设置。请在插件设置中设置它。")

regex.source: Notice("Failed to fetch an image after multiple attempts, try a different keyword and/or update the backup keyword list in settings.")
regex.target: Notice("多次尝试后未能获取图片，尝试使用不同的关键词和/或在设置中更新备份关键词列表。")

regex.source: .log(`No image found for "${keyword}". Using image for "${currentKeyword}" instead.`)
regex.target: .log(`未找到关键词 "${keyword}" 的图片。改为使用 "${currentKeyword}" 的图片。`)

regex.source: .log(`No image found for the provided keyword: "${keyword}". Trying a random default keyword.`)
regex.target: .log(`未找到提供关键词 "${keyword}" 的图片。尝试使用随机默认关键词。`)

regex.source: .error("No images found for any keywords, including the random default.")
regex.target: .error("没有任何关键词找到图片，包括随机默认值。")
name: "内容开始位置字段名称"

regex.source: text: "Optionally select which API provider to use for fetching images. See the Examples tab for more information on referencing images by URL or local image. You can use any combination of API keyword, URL, or local image between notes."
regex.target: text: "可选择使用哪个API提供商来获取图片。有关通过URL或本地图片引用图片的更多信息，请参见示例标签。您可以在笔记之间使用API关键词、URL或本地图片的任何组合。"

regex.source: text: "After each update you'll be prompted with the release notes. You can disable this in the plugin settings General tab."
regex.target: text: "每次更新后，系统都会提示您发布说明。您可以在插件设置常规选项卡中禁用此功能。"

regex.source: .setDesc("Apply banner only to direct children of the folder")
regex.target: .setDesc("仅对文件夹的直接子文件夹应用横幅")

regex.source: .setDesc("Select the API provider for fetching images")
.setDesc("Configure settings for images fetched from API. These settings apply when using keywords to fetch random images.")
regex.target: .setDesc("配置从API获取的图片设置。这些设置适用于使用关键词获取随机图片时。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Select the size of the image - (API only)")
.setDesc("Select the orientation of the image - (API only)")
.setDesc("Enter the number of random images to fetch (3-50) - (API only)")
regex.target: .setDesc("输入要获取的随机图片数量 (3-50) - (仅限API)")

regex.source: .setDesc("Set how the banner image should be displayed")
.setDesc("Set the default height of the banner image (100-2500 pixels)")
regex.target: .setDesc("设置横幅图片的默认高度 (100-2500像素)")

regex.source: .setDesc("Set the default fade effect for the banner image (-1500 to 100)")
regex.target: .setDesc("设置横幅图片的默认淡出效果 (-1500至100)")

regex.source: .setDesc("Set the default border radius of the banner image (0-50 pixels)")
regex.target: .setDesc("设置横幅图片的默认边框半径 (0-50像素)")

regex.source: text: "Set default banner images for specific folders. These will apply to all notes in the folder unless overridden by note-specific settings."
regex.target: text: "为特定文件夹设置默认横幅图片。除非被笔记特定的设置覆盖，否则这些将适用于文件夹中的所有笔记。"

regex.source: Notice(isValid ? "\u2705 Flickr API key is valid!" : "\u274C Invalid Flickr API key")
regex.target: Notice(isValid ? "✅ Flickr API 密钥有效！" : "❌ 无效的 Flickr API 密钥")

regex.source: Notice(isValid ? "\u2705 Unsplash API key is valid!" : "\u274C Invalid Unsplash API key")
regex.target: Notice(isValid ? "✅ Unsplash API 密钥有效！" : "❌ 无效的 Unsplash API 密钥")
Notice(`🧼 清理了 ${result.cleaned} 个孤立的固定图片`)

regex.source: .error("\u274C Failed to resolve valid file path")
regex.target: .error("\u274C 无法解析有效的文件路径")
name: "\u{1F4CC} 固定当前的横幅图片"
name: "\u{1F504} 刷新当前横幅图片"

regex.source: text: "Enter your Pexels API key. Get your API key from "
regex.target: text: "输入您的Pexels API密钥。从这里获取 "

regex.source: text: "Enter your Pixabay API key. Get your API key from "
regex.target: text: "输入您的Pixabay API密钥。从这里获取 "

regex.source: text: "Set the default vertical position of the image, how it should be displayed, and where the content should start. These are global settings and apply to all notes with banners unless overridden by folder or note-specific settings."
regex.target: text: "设置图片的默认纵向对齐位置、显示方式以及内容的起始位置。这些是全局设置，适用于所有带有横幅的笔记，除非被文件夹或笔记特定的设置覆盖。"

regex.source: text: 'Set default banner images for specific folders. These will apply to all notes in the folder unless overridden by note-specific settings. To get started, add a folder image setting and click the "+ Add Folder Image Setting" button below.'
regex.target: text: '为特定文件夹设置默认横幅图片。这些将应用于文件夹中的所有笔记，除非被特定于笔记的设置覆盖。要开始使用，请添加文件夹图片设置并单击下面的"+添加文件夹图片设置"按钮。'

regex.source: text: "Add the following fields to your note's frontmatter to customize the banner:"
regex.target: text: "将以下字段添加到您的笔记的属性中以自定义横幅："

regex.source: text: 'Note: The image display options are "auto", "cover", or "contain". The image repeat option is only applicable when the display is set to "contain".'
regex.target: text: '注意：图片显示选项为“自动”、“覆盖”或“包含”。图片重复选项仅在显示设置为“包含”时适用。'
text: `欢迎使用 \u{1F6A9}Pixel Banner v${this. version}`

regex.source: .setText("Choose Folder to save Pinned Banner Image")
regex.target: .setText("选择文件夹以保存固定横幅图片")

regex.source: .setDesc("Show a pin icon on random banner images that allows saving them to your vault. Once pinned, your frontmatter will be updated to use the local image instead of the API image.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在随机横幅图片上显示一个大头针图标，允许将它们保存到您的保管库。固定后，您的属性将更新为使用本地图片而不是API图片。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Default folder where pinned banner images will be saved")
regex.target: .setDesc("即将保存固定横幅图片的默认文件夹")

regex.source: .setDesc("Show a refresh icon next to the pin icon to get a new random image")
regex.target: .setDesc("在图钉图标旁边显示刷新图标以获取新的随机图片")

regex.source: .setDesc("Enter a comma-separated list of default keywords to be used when no keyword is provided in the frontmatter, or when the provided keyword does not return any results. - (API only)")
regex.target: .setDesc("输入默认关键词列表，使用逗号分隔，当在属性中未提供关键词，或提供的关键词没有返回任何结果时使用。- (仅限API)")

regex.source: .setDesc("Set the vertical position of the image (0-100)")
.setDesc("Set the default vertical position where the content starts (in pixels)")
regex.target: .setDesc("设置内容开始的默认纵向对齐位置（以像素为单位）")
.setDesc('当选择“包含”时启用图片重复')

regex.source: .setPlaceholder("Select or type folder path to save Pinned Banner Image")
regex.target: .setPlaceholder("选择或键入文件夹路径以保存固定横幅图片")

regex.source: .setTooltip("Remove pinned images from the default folder that are no longer referenced in Notes")
regex.target: .setTooltip("从默认文件夹中删除不再在笔记中引用的固定图片")

regex.source: text: 'Customize the frontmatter field names used for the banner and Y-position. You can define multiple names for each field, separated by commas. Field names can only contain letters, numbers, dashes, and underscores. Example: "banner, pixel-banner, header_image" could all be used as the banner field name.'
regex.target: text: '自定义横幅和Y位置使用的属性字段名称。您可以为每个字段定义多个名称，用逗号分隔。字段名称只能包含字母、数字、破折号和下划线。示例：“banner, pixel-banner, header_image”都可以用作横幅字段名称。'

regex.source: desc: "Set custom field names for the banner in frontmatter (comma-separated)"
regex.target: desc: "在属性中设置横幅的自定义字段名称（用逗号分隔）"

regex.target: desc: "在属性中设置Y位置的自定义字段名称（用逗号分隔）"

regex.target: text: "为所有笔记配置默认设置。每个文件夹和笔记都可以单独配置以覆盖这些默认设置。"

regex.source: text: "Enter a name for the image file."

regex.target: .setDesc("每次加载笔记时，从指定文件夹中随机选择一幅图片")
